message:
feat: Implement weakrefobject.zig TODO stubs with real functionality

- insert_weakref: Insert weakref into object's weakref list using
  tp_weaklistoffset to find list head, update doubly-linked list pointers
- remove_weakref: Remove weakref from list, update prev/next pointers
  and list head if necessary
- PyObject_ClearWeakRefs: Iterate through object's weakref list,
  clear all refs, call callbacks with weakref as argument

Reduces TODO count from 41 to 38.
